payload.answer: Cannot run /brain admin sql because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false.
citations: Input command: /brain admin sql SELECT * FROM memory_cards

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative SQL/debug command, not a user memory fact to resolve.

details: Rejected administrative SQL execution because debug SQL is disabled.
No memory was created, updated, or deleted.

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED to allow admin SQL debugging.
Use a supported non-SQL Brain command if you want to inspect memory behavior without debug SQL.
